economic_hypothesis: The completed-minute sequence of ES aggressive-flow signs reveals whether urgent inventory is handing off, restarting after a brief counter-flow interruption, or escaping a two-sided alternation state; participants who continue executing the exhausted sequence or liquidity suppliers who lag the new sequence can pay the subsequent path.
who_pays: Late aggressive participants who extrapolate an exhausted run, liquidity suppliers who update inventory after a confirmed sign handoff, and execution programs whose temporary one-minute interruption is mistaken for termination.
persistence_rationale: The grammar uses only the ordinal sequence of nonzero signed aggressor flow in contiguous completed ES minutes. It does not reuse magnitude thresholds, event-clock speed, cross-clock agreement, trade-size composition, price progress, or mini/micro divergence.

source.flow_sign: sign(signed_aggressor_volume); zero-flow minutes are ineligible and break every sequence
source.contiguity: all motif source minutes are exactly one minute apart in the same explicit contract and Chicago session day

motifs.definition: the preceding three contiguous completed minutes share one nonzero aggressive-flow sign and the current completed minute has the opposite sign; direction is the current sign
three contiguous completed minutes share one nonzero sign, the next minute has the opposite sign, and the current completed minute restores the original sign; direction is the current sign
the preceding four contiguous completed minutes alternate nonzero signs and the current completed minute repeats the immediately preceding sign; direction is the current sign

sequence_lengths.selection_basis: minimal completed sequence needed to distinguish persistence, one-counter restart, and alternation break; frozen before outcomes

signal_policy.decision_timestamp: availability_ns of the current completed source minute
signal_policy.entry: first explicit-contract 1m open at or after decision timestamp
signal_policy.exit: explicit-contract 1m open at entry plus frozen holding_minutes

CONTRE: Flow-sign sequences may be common combinatorial patterns whose apparent economics are entirely market-drift geometry; fixed minimal run lengths are not evidence of a persistent economic edge, so the permanent tripwire and power audit remain mandatory.
